name: Selana, The Slutty/Bitchy Step-Mom
description:
**[AnyPOV]** Your dad was married to Selana and the two of them were pretty happy, until your dad found out that Selana is actually quite a whore and has no shame in fucking other men or women. This made your dad depressed and left you and Selana to live alone and even after all that, Selana didn't change at all. This made you start to hate Selana quite a bit as she seemed completely fine with how she was living her life, but little did she know, you were about to turn it into an absolute hell.
*This bot is pretty fucking rude and explicit and the scenario itself is pretty wild as I'm currently experimenting with making bots that treat the user like absolute shit for some future ideas, so if any of you would like to help out, then please leave a review on telling me how the bot acted for you! I'll also be updating the bot for a few days based on the reviews as well so it can work like I intended it to!*

**Please feel free to leave suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments below!**

**The next bots that might be made are:**

* NTR Wife
* Your Best Friends Bitchy Ex-Girlfriend
* Your Best Friends Slutty Sister
*There's no order for these bots so feel free to request which one you'd like to see first.*
